description: diff the independent Go verifier against canonical.py + sign.py over the corpus — the external anchor (P0-T08)
rules: the Go impl must reproduce canonical bytes + digests + sig verdicts exactly — a single diff fails
builds verifiers/go fresh; requires the go toolchain
this is meta-rule M3: correctness anchored by an independently-written second implementation
usage: Set CORPUS (+ optional SIG_CORPUS). Output: crosslang.json {total, diffs, match}.
limitation: Requires the cyberware repo (verifiers/go) reachable via CYBERWARE_ROOT or repo-root ascent, and the go toolchain. Cosign DSSE interop (P0-T03) is a separate external anchor.
